title: Lagavulin Matriarch
move_pattern: Starts asleep with Asleep power. While asleep, repeats Sleep (does nothing). Once the Asleep power expires, cycles through Slash → Disembowel → Slash 2 → Soul Siphon repeatedly.
notes: Lagavulin Matriarch begins combat in a sleep state with Asleep 3 power. During this time, it takes no actions. Once the Asleep power expires or is removed, it awakens and enters a combat cycle. The monster has 12 Plating at the start. At 50% HP or below, its eyes open, indicating it is fully awake. The monster gains Strength each time it uses Soul Siphon, making it increasingly dangerous as the fight progresses.
